unit.comment: /* * Created by Phil on 09/11/2010. * Copyright 2010 Two Blue Cubes Ltd. All rights reserved. * * Distributed under the Boost Software License, Version 1.0. (See accompanying * file LICENSE_1_0.txt or copy at http://www.boost.org/LICENSE_1_0.txt) */
// Unreachable code -- MSVC 19 (VS 2015) sees right through the indirection

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "When checked exceptions are thrown they can be expected or unexpected", "[!throws]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "Expected exceptions that don't throw or unexpected exceptions fail the test", "[.][failing][!throws]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "When unchecked exceptions are thrown directly they are always failures", "[.][failing][!throws]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "An unchecked exception reports the line of the last assertion", "[.][failing][!throws]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "When unchecked exceptions are thrown from sections they are always failures", "[.][failing][!throws]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "When unchecked exceptions are thrown from functions they are always failures", "[.][failing][!throws]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "When unchecked exceptions are thrown during a REQUIRE the test should abort fail", "[.][failing][!throws]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "When unchecked exceptions are thrown during a CHECK the test should continue", "[.][failing][!throws]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "When unchecked exceptions are thrown, but caught, they do not affect the test", "[!throws]" )

macro.name: CATCH_TRANSLATE_EXCEPTION
macro.argument_list: ( CustomException& ex )

macro.name: CATCH_TRANSLATE_EXCEPTION
macro.argument_list: ( CustomStdException& ex )

macro.name: CATCH_TRANSLATE_EXCEPTION
macro.argument_list: ( double& ex )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ("Non-std exceptions can be translated", "[.][failing][!throws]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ("Custom std-exceptions can be custom translated", "[.][failing][!throws]" )

function.name: throwCustom

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "Custom exceptions can be translated when testing for nothrow", "[.][failing][!throws]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "Custom exceptions can be translated when testing for throwing as something else", "[.][failing][!throws]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "Unexpected exceptions can be translated", "[.][failing][!throws]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "Exception messages can be tested for", "[!throws]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "Mismatching exception messages failing the test", "[.][failing][!throws]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "#748 - captures with unexpected exceptions", "[.][failing][!throws][!shouldfail]" )
